findings.description: The knowledge file adds "（カンマ区切り）" to the permitRequestIds description, but the source table never explicitly states comma-separated format. The XML example shows value="BC0010,BC0011" but this is an implicit convention, not a documented specification.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row: 「チェック対象外リクエストID | permitRequestIds | List<String> | 任意指定」 — no mention of comma separator. XML example: value="BC0010,BC0011" shows usage but does not define the format.

findings.location: S9 warning — Section count vs source headings
findings.description: The automated S9 warning (section count 3 < source headings 6) is a false positive. The source has exactly 3 h2 headings (概要, ハンドラ処理フロー, 設定項目・拡張ポイント). The extra count comes from three standalone '++++++' decorative separator lines that have no heading text and are not valid RST headings. The knowledge file's 3 sections correctly match the 3 h2 headings.
